title: Fact check: Did a former employee expose Candace Owens behavior? New allegations bring fresh attention to her workplace style
summary_full: A former employee has accused Candace Owens of “narcissistic” behavior, but the claims remain unverified. No evidence, official response, or independent confirmation has been provided. The allegations mention Turning Point USA and Blexit, but nothing has been proven. Social media remains divided, and the situation is still unclear with no investigation or legal action so far.
